issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for queries.
Missing checksum verification for npm and pip installations.

scenarios.name: Ecommerce model with nested monthly and customer breakdowns
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a reusable source with dimensions/measures and uses nest to produce per-segment monthly trend and top-customer breakdowns in one query; baseline writes generic SQL with separate CTEs that lack Malloy's nested-result structure.

scenarios.name: Pipeline filtering reusing a named view
scenarios.rationale: Treatment chains transformations with -> and reuses a named view (revenue_by_month) plus a post-filter on aggregated results, matching the skill's pipeline pattern; baseline produces standalone SQL queries that don't compose.
